title: QILERR Small Bin Liners 160 Counts 10 Litre Bin Bag Thickening Pedal Waste Bags Strong Wastebasket Trash Can Liners for Bathroom Toilet, Bedroom, Office, Desk Fit 10-12 ltr, Blue
features: 【Small Pedal Bin Bag Size】The 10 L/3 gallon bin liners provides you with 160 waste bags, with dimensions of 17.7 * 19.7 inches 45 x 50 cm, It is larger than the general garbage bag size, provides you with more capacity, and can adapt to different styles of rubbish bin and scenes to be used.

【Thickening Bin Bags】Our small bin liners are made of high density polyethylene material, each garbage bag is thickened to 3.5 grams, which is more sturdy and durable than most 2.8 gram garbage bags, without worrying about punctures, tears, or damage.

【High Quality Bin Bags】Our 10 litre bin bags have a total of 4 rolls with 40 bags per roll; bottom star shaped seal, shorter sealing length, multi-layer stacking integrated molding, you don't have to worry about garbage bag leakage and tearing, garbage bags are connected by breakpoints, easy to access.

【Multipurpose Garbage Bags】Ideal for use as a bathroom bin bags, food waste bags, kitchen, living room, bedroom, office, yard, baby diaper bucket, fast pet picker ect, Can be used for 10 to 12L pedal/round/ellipse trash bin.
【Satisfaction Guarantee】If you order, we shall provide 24H service, a 30 days unconditional replacement and full refund as well. Don’t’ hesitate, click and add to cart now!
description: Product Description QILERR Bin Liners 10L Thickening Bin Bags In order to adapt to multiple scenarios, we have increased the thickness of the garbage bag by 25%, making it more sturdy and durable, fully meeting your usage needs, without worrying about punctures, tears, or damage. Excellent Material Adopted high quality pure PE material, with excellent resistance to tearing, no breakable, leak-proof and extra durable. Extremely tough Trash bags have very strong toughness are not easy to tear Easy tear off design With easy-to-tear interface design, it makes it easier for you to take the garbage bag.
